## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**RMA_HEADER** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUSTOMER -> CUSTOMER); ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO); ORDER_HIST_HEAD (INVOICE -> INVOICE); SHIPMENT_HEADER (ORDER_SUFFIX -> ORDER_SUFFIX)

**RMA_HIST_LOT** -> BIN_MASTER (ORIG_SHPMT_BIN -> BIN); COUNTRY_CODES (COUNTRY_OF_ORIGIN -> CODE); INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); ITEM_MASTER (HEAT->HEAT, LOT->LOT, SERIAL->SERIAL_NUMBER); JOB_HEADER (JOB->JOB, SUFFIX->SUFFIX); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOCN -> LOCN); ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO); ORDER_HIST_HEAD (INVOICE -> INVOICE); ORDER_LINES (ORDER_LINE -> RECORD_NO); PROJECT_MASTER (ALLOC_TO -> PROJECT); SHIPMENT_HEADER (ORDER_SUFFIX->ORDER_SUFFIX, ORIG_SHPMT_SEQ->ORDER_SUFFIX); UM_CODES (UM_LENGTH->CODE, UM_WIDTH->CODE); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**RMA_H_SVC_PERFORM** -> ITEM_MASTER (SERIAL -> SERIAL_NUMBER)

**RMA_LINES** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); INV_CROSS_REF (CUSTOMER_PART -> CUSTOMER_PART); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOCATION -> LOCN); ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO); ORDER_LINES (ORDER_LINE -> RECORD_NO); RMA_HEADER (RMA_ID -> RMA_ID); RMA_SVC_REC (SERVICE_REQUESTED -> SVC_ID); SHIPMENT_HEADER (ORDER_SUFFIX -> ORDER_SUFFIX)

**RMA_LN_SVPF_NOTES** -> ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO); RMA_HEADER (RMA_ID -> RMA_ID); RMA_LINES (LINE -> RMA_LINE); RMA_SVC_PERFORM (SVC_SEQ -> SVC_PERF_SEQ); SHIPMENT_HEADER (SUFFIX -> ORDER_SUFFIX)

**RMA_LN_SVRQ_NOTES** -> ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO); RMA_HEADER (RMA_ID -> RMA_ID); RMA_LINES (LINE -> RMA_LINE); SHIPMENT_HEADER (SUFFIX -> ORDER_SUFFIX)

**RMA_SVC_PERFORM** -> BIN_MASTER (BIN -> BIN); ITEM_MASTER (HEAT->HEAT, LOT->LOT, SERIAL->SERIAL_NUMBER); ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO); ORDER_LINES (P_ORDER_LINE -> RECORD_NO); RMA_HEADER (RMA_ID -> RMA_ID); RMA_LINES (RMA_LINE -> RMA_LINE); RMA_SVC_REC (SERVICE_PERFORMED -> SVC_ID)

**RMA_WARRANTY_C** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST -> CUSTOMER); ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO); RMA_HEADER (RMA_ID -> RMA_ID); SHIPMENT_HEADER (SUFFIX -> ORDER_SUFFIX)
